tasks.label: Paper: Build EN (author)
args: source "$HOME/.zprofile" 2>/dev/null || true; export PATH="$HOME/Library/TinyTeX/bin/universal-darwin:$PATH"; cd docs/paper-latex && latexmk -xelatex -interaction=nonstopmode -outdir=build -auxdir=build paper_author_en.tex

tasks.label: Paper: Build DE (author)
args: source "$HOME/.zprofile" 2>/dev/null || true; export PATH="$HOME/Library/TinyTeX/bin/universal-darwin:$PATH"; cd docs/paper-latex && latexmk -xelatex -interaction=nonstopmode -outdir=build -auxdir=build paper_author_de.tex

tasks.label: Paper: Clean LaTeX artifacts
args: source "$HOME/.zprofile" 2>/dev/null || true; export PATH="$HOME/Library/TinyTeX/bin/universal-darwin:$PATH"; cd docs/paper-latex && rm -rf build && latexmk -C paper_author_en.tex && latexmk -C paper_author_de.tex
